relationship: The FY2025 guidelines document provides the technical framework and release specifications for the ICD-10-CM system, while the October 2025 guidelines document contains the specific clinical rules and coding criteria that will be implemented under that framework. Together, they define both the structural capabilities of the coding system and the operational logic for assigning diagnosis and external cause codes to clinical encounters.
cross_reference_notes: When comparing these documents, analysts should verify that the clinical criteria and inclusion/exclusion notes in the October 2025 guidelines align with the technical configurations and feature sets described in the FY25 guidelines to ensure the coding rules are supported by the system architecture.
